scripts.test:lint: pnpm --dir ../.. exec biome check modules/web/package.json modules/web/src modules/web/test
scripts.test:web: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @cz-stack/contract run build && pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.test: pnpm run test:type && pnpm run test:lint && pnpm run test:web
